title: Understanding API Security in GRC Context
content:
Your newsletter content will appear here after the first Tuesday run.

The pipeline generates comprehensive newsletter content (~2000 words) every Tuesday, ready for you to publish on Wednesday.

The content will:
- Continue your "From Non-Tech to Tech-Aware GRC" series
- Match your writing style from previous newsletters
- Include practical examples and free resources
- Be based on that week's top GRC news

Once the pipeline runs on Tuesday, this will be replaced with your full newsletter.
